content: *꾸러미, 일반* {color="gray"} --- **무게:** 39 lbs **비용:** 39 GP --- 외교관의 꾸러미에는 다음 물품들이 포함됩니다: [상자](/212f7f5a1e8081bf953cdd5ec67d8a96?pvs=25), [고급 복장](/212f7f5a1e8081de8ec5c45efecf5fd7?pvs=25), [잉크](/212f7f5a1e80813e86bcd5970785c828?pvs=25), 5개의 [잉크 펜](/212f7f5a1e808169b206ce647700482f?pvs=25), [램프](/212f7f5a1e808167aee5c154cbb6561f?pvs=25), 2개의 [지도나 두루마리 통](/212f7f5a1e80811ab312f24d090b7e78?pvs=25), [기름](/212f7f5a1e8081959762fb1471be0875?pvs=25) 4병, [종이](/212f7f5a1e8081e6af2af37c2a7cb209?pvs=25) 5장, [양피지](/212f7f5a1e8081aa8340e1a781812e1a?pvs=25) 5장, [향수](/212f7f5a1e8081c6b2b2f299053d87ca?pvs=25), [부싯깃통](/212f7f5a1e80813da4afc2be9884e5a6?pvs=25).
